prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `880c1354`.
codex_response:
Implemented task `880c1354` as an ARC2 package. The rule is: keep the 4/7 scaffold fixed, order the non-4/7 connected border regions by their first clockwise border touchpoint, then rotate their colors forward by one step around that cycle.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as a starting point and corrected the sonnet hint in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_880c1354/notes.md#L1), because the official examples do not always have four distinct corner regions. No new `dsl_ext.py` primitive was needed.

Verified:
- Official examples: `4/4` passed.
- Generated examples: `1000/1000` passed.
- Built artifacts exist at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/880c1354/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/880c1354/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/880c1354/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/880c1354/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/880c1354/previews/preview_03.png).

Main files:
- [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_880c1354/verifier.py#L6)
- [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_880c1354/generator.py#L11)
- [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_880c1354/helpers.py#L4)
- [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_880c1354/__init__.py#L1)

The generator stays on-family by sampling a bank of 8x8 scaffold variants built from row-wise boundary tracks and cap rows, which reproduces the official mix of 2-, 3-, and 4-region cases.
